title: settings — HTTP routes
description: REST-style per-group surface. Actions declared via #[AsAction] on controllers so no `routes/*.php` file is needed at the app level.

groups.name: tenant-settings
groups.description: Tenant + user settings surface. Public groups (AsSetting.public=true) skip the auth middleware via route-level exclusion.

routes.description: List every registered group + resolved values for the caller. Paginated.
Full schema for admin UI rendering. Returns groups + sections + fields + control types + validation.
Read one group's resolved values. Sensitive fields masked.
Partial update. Fires SettingsChangeEvent per changed field. Non-listed fields untouched.
Clear an override at the caller's scope — falls through to lower scope on next read.
